# Café Debug API — Copilot Instructions

## Project
ASP.NET Core 9 REST API for the Café Debug podcast platform.
Repository: https://github.com/JessicaNathany/cafedebug-backend.api

## Documentation Rules
- README.md → English (default, shown on GitHub homepage)
- README.pt-BR.md → Brazilian Portuguese
- CONTRIBUTING.md → English
- docs/CONTRIBUTING-pt-BR.md → Brazilian Portuguese
- Both language versions must always be in sync
- Same section order and structure in both files

## Never translate
- Code blocks, CLI commands, URLs, env variable names,
  package names, endpoint paths, JSON keys
